messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0044",
  "title": "每月事件数量",
  "page_index": 13,
  "page_range": "13"
}

Section text:
## 每月事件数量

基于股权变更日期统计

![](../images/12/666_886_1218_1306_image.jpg)
[image_caption]
这是一张饼图，展示了不同类型的持股变更情况。图表的主要信息如下：

- 新增持股：102起
- 持股变更（退出）：27起
- 持股变更（继续持有）：13起

总共有142起持股变更事件。饼图的不同颜色部分分别代表上述三种类型的变化，蓝色部分表示新增持股，灰色部分表示持股变更（退出），绿色部分表示持股变更（继续持有）。
[/image_caption]

![](../images/12/1242_889_1909_1347_image.jpg)
[image_caption]
这是一张柱状图，展示了从1月到10月的数值变化。每个柱子代表一个月的数据，柱子的颜色为青色和蓝色，其中6月的柱子为蓝色，其余为青色。具体数值如下：

- 1月：19
- 2月：6
- 3月：20
- 4月：17
- 5月：19
- 6月：21
- 7月：11
- 8月：15
- 9月：9
- 10月：5

图表显示了数值在不同月份的变化趋势，其中6月的数值最高，为21，而10月的数值最低，为5。整体来看，数值在年初较高，中间有波动，年末有所下降。
[/image_caption]

message.content:
This section enables retrieval for questions regarding the volume, categorization, and monthly trends of equity change events. It answers:
- **What are the total and categorical event counts?** 142 total events: 102 new shareholdings, 27 exits, 13 continued holdings.
- **What is the monthly distribution and trend from January to October?** Exact counts per month (Jan:19, Feb:6, Mar:20, Apr:17, May:19, Jun:21, Jul:11, Aug:15, Sep:9, Oct:5), with June as the peak (21) and October as the lowest (5), showing an overall pattern of early-year highs, mid-year fluctuations, and late-year decline.
- **What visual evidence and data basis are provided?** A pie chart for type proportions and a bar chart for monthly trends, with all statistics explicitly derived from equity change dates.
Covers topics (equity changes), entities (shareholding types), dates (Jan–Oct), metrics (event counts, peaks/lows), figures (pie/bar charts), and evidence types (quantitative statistical data). No definitions, procedures, or tables are present.

response_text:
This section enables retrieval for questions regarding the volume, categorization, and monthly trends of equity change events. It answers:
- **What are the total and categorical event counts?** 142 total events: 102 new shareholdings, 27 exits, 13 continued holdings.
- **What is the monthly distribution and trend from January to October?** Exact counts per month (Jan:19, Feb:6, Mar:20, Apr:17, May:19, Jun:21, Jul:11, Aug:15, Sep:9, Oct:5), with June as the peak (21) and October as the lowest (5), showing an overall pattern of early-year highs, mid-year fluctuations, and late-year decline.
- **What visual evidence and data basis are provided?** A pie chart for type proportions and a bar chart for monthly trends, with all statistics explicitly derived from equity change dates.
Covers topics (equity changes), entities (shareholding types), dates (Jan–Oct), metrics (event counts, peaks/lows), figures (pie/bar charts), and evidence types (quantitative statistical data). No definitions, procedures, or tables are present.
